name: 宗教改革
subject: history
domain_name: 中世纪与近代早期 / Medieval & Early Modern / Medieval & Early Modern
curriculum_points: Evaluate the causes and consequences of the Protestant Reformation, including the role of theological dissent, political fragmentation, and the Catholic Counter-Reformation in reshaping religious authority and European state structures.
